title: Pushing the limits of health — training/eating/supplement system, Apr 2026
html:
TL;DR

  • A same-day-as-vault-bootstrap micro-creed on physical-health discipline. Three pillars:
    1. Training-toward-something: "Choose something / have something you are training toward."
    2. Pre-determined eating: "Eat designated pre-determined (mealprepped or portions known) meals. Eating out once a week."
    3. Pre-planned lifts: "Go in lifts knowing what you'll do."
  • The intensity directive: "Train as hard as you can possibly train, train as hard as a mf. Where you feel the lactic acid, you feel you hit the wall, then keep going from there. Go beyond, this is where the growth is."
  • Supplement system request: "Have a killer / figure out a killer system for taking supplements / something where I literally can't forget it. Something like having it next to where you drink water. Or I know if I'm going gym I'll have an energy drink so having it there."

Key quote

"Train as hard as a mf. Where you feel the lactic acid, you feel you hit the wall, then keep going from there. Go beyond, this is where the growth is."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Health-stack analog of the "max effort" / 2024 creed applied to physical training. Same Yahir → different domain.
  • The "choose something to train toward" principle is identical in shape to the asking the right question / Brotein thesis (streak/leaderboard/specific-goal-needed) — Yahir believes goal-specificity drives output across domains.
  • "Lactic acid wall + go beyond" — the somatic version of 2025 10 14 feral strength manic focus and 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker's "head-first into battle, arm chopped off, doesn't matter" register.
  • The forgetting-supplements problem is exactly the habit-stacking insight; the proposed solution ("next to where you drink water") is environmental design over willpower. Worth tagging as a habit stacking data point.
  • Same-day timestamp as the vault bootstrap (2026-04-26) — Yahir is doing personal-system housekeeping concurrently with the vault setup. Note this is the last-modified timestamp for the vault context.

Open questions

  • What is he training toward as of Apr 2026? Six-pack (2025 01 01 project 2025) is a target. Any specific event?
  • Has the supplement-system been built yet?
  • Pairs with supplement stack concept — what's actually on his stack?
